'''rakama''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:huckleberry|huckleberry]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| r-k-m
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:huckleberry|huckleberry]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| rakama
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:rækæmæth|rækæmæth]] || [[word:rækæmæj|rækæmæj]] || [[word:rækæmæsh|rækæmæsh]] || [[word:rækæmæ|rækæmæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:rakakamath|rakakamath]] || [[word:rakakamaj|rakakamaj]] || [[word:rakakamash|rakakamash]] || [[word:rakakama|rakakama]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:rakamath|rakamath]] || [[word:rakamaj|rakamaj]] || [[word:rakamash|rakamash]] || [[word:rakama|rakama]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:rakafmath|rakafmath]] || [[word:rakafmaj|rakafmaj]] || [[word:rakafmash|rakafmash]] || [[word:rakafmaf|rakafmaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:rakamatha|rakamatha]] || [[word:rakamaja|rakamaja]] || [[word:rakamasha|rakamasha]] || [[word:rakamaka|rakamaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:rakamath|rakamath]] || [[word:rakamaj|rakamaj]] || [[word:rakamash|rakamash]] || [[word:rakama|rakama]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:rakamathal|rakamathal]] || [[word:rakamajal|rakamajal]] || [[word:rakamashal|rakamashal]] || [[word:rakamakal|rakamakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:rakamathatha|rakamathatha]] || [[word:rakamajaja|rakamajaja]] || [[word:rakamashasha|rakamashasha]] || [[word:rakamaka|rakamaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:rakamathan|rakamathan]] || [[word:rakamajan|rakamajan]] || [[word:rakamashan|rakamashan]] || [[word:rakamakan|rakamakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:rakamathaoro|rakamathaoro]] || [[word:rakamajaoro|rakamajaoro]] || [[word:rakamashaoro|rakamashaoro]] || [[word:rakamakaoro|rakamakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d0c3b9f}}
